detail.description:
Like action shooters? Bullet Echo is an exciting PvP tactical top-down shooter. Use stealth, team up, and shoot to win in this shooting game with multiplayer!

Choose from dozens of different heroes with unique play styles, guns and abilities.
Unite with friends, set a strategy, and be the last team standing when the battle ends!

- UNIQUE TACTICAL STEALTH ACTION: Your vision is limited by the beam of a flashlight, but you can hear enemies' steps and shots.
- DESIGNED FOR TEAM PLAY: Start playin
detail.recentChanges:
RECKONING SEASON
The reckoning starts in Mortuary. Tear through a new Star Pass loaded with fresh skins, stickers, graffiti, and tombstones. The dead have more company now.

MEET BONNIE
With an SMG, toxic rounds, and two vicious hounds, Bonnie locks down ground with poison zones, patrol pressure, and explosive punishment for reckless pushes. She can even revive a fallen ally — dying isn't an excuse anymore!

VISUAL UPGRADES & FIXES
Sharper visuals all around. Fixed a minimum of 6 to 7 bugs.
